text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
A long, long time ago… there lived an old man 
and an old woman.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: One day, the woman went down to the river to do the washing… But then, from the river… Slish, swosh… slish…

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Th-This is just some normal folk tale, right? 
The atmosphere you're creating seems
kind of… off…

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
S-S-Surely it's her unique way of speaking. 
Especially on the swoshing sounds…!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It's harder than it seems. I've never actually
heard the sound, after all…

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah, that's understandable! There's a certain muckiness to slish, swosh, isn't there!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
…Pay it no mind. I was just agreeing 
that Rice's "slish swosh" sounded 
really cute.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: My friend is here with us, you see…
